channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democratic Party's Future at Stake in Tuesday Primaries
item.description: At least six primaries across the country will test which faction of the Democratic Party gains momentum in the ongoing internal struggle.

item.title: Trump's latest executive order sidesteps AI regulations for now
item.description: President Trump signed a narrowed executive order on artificial intelligence and cybersecurity Tuesday, avoiding new AI rules.

item.title: Anthropic faces AI spending backlash ahead of IPO
item.description: Anthropic filed for an IPO as corporate America enters its AI sticker shock phase, with companies questioning spending.

item.title: Just lead: 6 ways today's CEOs can meet the moment
item.description: Axios CEO Jim VandeHei outlines a plan to help CEOs and leaders navigate the current moment, with a sneak peek over the weekend.
